# SD-WAN Delivery Contract Fixtures

These public contract fixtures were copied byte-for-byte from
`/root/code/.worktrees/sdwan-plan-b-control/testdata/controlcontract/v1/` at
source commit `fac22345ebada4071106da578d28ca176fb6cca7`.

`manifest.json` contains only the public Ed25519 verification key needed to
verify the signed fixture envelopes. No private key, seed, credential, or
other private signing material is present or permitted in this directory.
